Products.Name: Smirnoff Red Vodka

CentreTag.TagContentText: 20% off spirits and wine. T&C's apply.^^

Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Smirnoff Red Vodka' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Smirnoff No. 21 Red Vodka, also known as Red Label, is celebrated as the world's best-selling premium vodka. Its iconic reputation stems from a meticulous distillation process: triple-distilled from a blend of grains and filtered ten times through seven columns of sustainable charcoal. This results in its exceptionally smooth, pure taste that is both soft and full-bodied.

The vodka's unmatched quality has garnered international acclaim, including a Gold Medal at the 2019 San Francisco World Spirits Competition. Perfect for crafting classic cocktails like the Smirnoff Martini or Bloody Mary, it also shines on its own over ice. Smirnoff No. 21 is distributed in over 130 countries, symbolizing its universal appeal and over 150 years of heritage.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Grant's has long been known as a quality blender of fine Scotch and this, the original Grant's shows you why. Silky smooth with a smoky finish it will delight every level of Scotch drinker.
TASTING NOTES: Vanilla essence and floral scents balance the flavour’s complex layers.
SERVING SUGGESTION: Enjoy this whisky neat to allow the flavours to fully develop. Alternatively, add sugar, bitters and a slice of orange peel for a zesty Grant’s Old Fashioned cocktail.

AdditionalAttributes.description: The story of Grant Burge is one of the past, the present, and the future. Planting their roots in the Barossa Valley in 1865, the Burges began as a family of devoted vignerons. For five generations, they spent their days toiling on the land, understanding the soil, and from it, growing grapes that would become premium wines of today.

Products.Name: Grant Burge Cabernet Sauvignon Cameron Vale
Products.DisplayName: Grant Burge Cabernet Sauvignon Cameron Vale 750ml

CentreTag.TagContent: 20% off spirits and wine. T&C's apply.^^
CentreTag.TagContentText: 20% off spirits and wine. T&C's apply.^^

Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Grant Burge Cabernet Sauvignon Cameron Vale' has a supply limit of 6. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.
Products.SmallFormatDescription: Grant Burge Cabernet Sauvignon Cameron Vale
Products.FullDescription: Grant Burge Cabernet Sauvignon Cameron Vale

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Our Vigneron Collection brings together outstanding vineyards and our unique winemaking style to showcase the best of each variety.

Our Cabernet Sauvignon is named after one of the Barossa's earliest vineyards sites, a Cabernet vineyard planted by the Burge family in the early 1970s.

This fine example of full bodied Barossa Cabernet Sauvignon takes elements from the Barossa Valley floor and the higher cooler Eden Valley. The vineyards were carefully selected and harvested; the fruit was destemmed and fermented in small static fermenters, retaining varietal expression. Once fermentation was completed, the wine was transferred to a combination of new and older French oak barrels for 18 months' maturation before bottling.

The Cabernet represents a pure expression of the variety and the region, drinking well now and rewarding for those who patiently cellar for up to 10 years.

Products.Name: Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey

CentreTag.TagContent: 20% off spirits and wine. T&C's apply.^^
CentreTag.TagContentText: 20% off spirits and wine. T&C's apply.^^

Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey' has a supply limit of 3. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.description: Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey is one of the world's best-selling whiskeys with a smooth character and flavor, true to Mr. Jack Daniel's original recipe. This American whiskey is made from the finest corn, rye and barley malt mixed with the iron-free water that flows from the Cave Spring right on grounds of the distillery. From there, Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey is charcoal mellowed, drop by drop, through 10 feet of sugar maple charcoal, which imparts the distinct smoothness of this best-in-class whiskey. Finally, Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey is matured in handcrafted, charred white oak barrels until the tasters decide it's ready. Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 is perfect with great music and in great company. Enjoy this alcohol drink neat, on the rocks, or in your favorite cocktails and mixed drinks, like an Old Fashioned or Whiskey Sour cocktail. Please Drink Responsibly.

AdditionalAttributes.description: "Bigger bottle. Smaller price. Win-win."The Silhouette range of wines produced by Baily Baily reflect the fun loving nature of our approach to wine; we've used the rhyming of Bingo Calls to name our wines. Enjoy No. 73: Queen Bee.With plenty of fruity flavour, a nice tight bead and a lovely finish, it's your reason to celebrate every day.Produced by or on behalf of Pinnacle Drinks, part of Endeavour Group Limited.
